<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8"/>
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0"/>
<title>Sandhya Rubber Stamp — Custom Stamps, Surat</title>
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com"/>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Playfair+Display:wght@400;600;700;900&family=DM+Sans:wght@300;400;500;600&display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/>
<style>
*, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }
:root {
  --ink: #0d1117; --ink-light: #1e2530;
  --gold: #c8973a; --gold-light: #e8b84b;
  --cream: #faf8f4; --warm: #f2ede4;
  --muted: #6b7280;
  --wa: #25D366; --wa-dark: #128C7E;
  --r: 16px;
  --display: 'Playfair Display', Georgia, serif;
  --body: 'DM Sans', sans-serif;
}
html { scroll-behavior: smooth; }
body { font-family: var(--body); background: var(--cream); color: var(--ink); overflow-x: hidden; }

/* HEADER */
.header { position: sticky; top: 0; z-index: 100; background: rgba(13,17,23,0.97); backdrop-filter: blur(12px); border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(200,151,58,0.2); padding: 0 5vw; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; height: 68px; }
.logo { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; text-decoration: none; }
.logo-icon { width: 42px; height: 42px; border-radius: 10px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--gold), var(--gold-light)); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 20px; }
.logo-name { font-family: var(--display); font-size: 17px; font-weight: 700; color: #fff; line-height: 1.1; }
.logo-sub { font-size: 10px; color: var(--gold); text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.18em; }
nav { display: flex; gap: 32px; }
nav a { font-size: 13.5px; font-weight: 500; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.6); text-decoration: none; transition: color .2s; }
nav a:hover { color: var(--gold); }
.hdr-cta { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; background: var(--wa); color: #fff; padding: 10px 20px; border-radius: 50px; font-size: 13.5px; font-weight: 600; text-decoration: none; transition: background .2s, transform .15s; }
.hdr-cta:hover { background: var(--wa-dark); transform: scale(1.03); }

/* HERO */
.hero { min-height: 88vh; background: var(--ink); display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; align-items: center; padding: 80px 5vw; gap: 60px; position: relative; overflow: hidden; }
.hero::before { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0; background: radial-gradient(ellipse 60% 80% at 70% 50%, rgba(200,151,58,0.12) 0%, transparent 70%); pointer-events: none; }
.hero-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; border: 1px solid rgba(200,151,58,0.35); background: rgba(200,151,58,0.08); color: var(--gold); padding: 7px 16px; border-radius: 50px; font-size: 11.5px; font-weight: 600; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.15em; margin-bottom: 28px; }
.hero h1 { font-family: var(--display); font-size: clamp(2.8rem, 5vw, 4.5rem); font-weight: 900; line-height: 1.05; color: #fff; margin-bottom: 24px; }
.hero h1 em { font-style: normal; color: var(--gold); }
.hero p { font-size: 17px; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.65); line-height: 1.7; max-width: 480px; margin-bottom: 40px; }
.hero-btns { display: flex; gap: 16px; flex-wrap: wrap; }
.btn-wa { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; background: var(--wa); color: #fff; padding: 15px 28px; border-radius: 50px; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 700; text-decoration: none; box-shadow: 0 8px 32px rgba(37,211,102,0.3); transition: all .2s; }
.btn-wa:hover { background: var(--wa-dark); transform: translateY(-2px); }
.btn-outline { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; border: 1.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.2); background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05); color: #fff; padding: 15px 28px; border-radius: 50px; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 600; text-decoration: none; transition: all .2s; }
.btn-outline:hover { border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.4); background: rgba(255,255,255,0.1); }
.hero-visual { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 16px; }
.hero-img-main { grid-column: 1 / -1; border-radius: 20px; overflow: hidden; height: 260px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08); box-shadow: 0 20px 60px rgba(0,0,0,0.5); }
.hero-img-sub { border-radius: 16px; overflow: hidden; height: 160px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08); box-shadow: 0 10px 40px rgba(0,0,0,0.4); }
.hero-img-main img, .hero-img-sub img { width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; }

/* WHY */
.why { background: var(--warm); padding: 80px 5vw; border-top: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.06); border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.06); }
.why-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(220px, 1fr)); gap: 28px; max-width: 1100px; margin: 0 auto; }
.why-card { background: #fff; border-radius: 20px; padding: 32px 28px; border: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.07); box-shadow: 0 2px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.04); transition: transform .2s, box-shadow .2s; }
.why-card:hover { transform: translateY(-4px); box-shadow: 0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.09); }
.why-icon { width: 52px; height: 52px; border-radius: 14px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--gold), var(--gold-light)); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 24px; margin-bottom: 20px; }
.why-card h3 { font-family: var(--display); font-size: 20px; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 10px; }
.why-card p { font-size: 14.5px; color: var(--muted); line-height: 1.65; }

/* SECTION LABEL */
.section-label { text-align: center; margin-bottom: 56px; }
.section-label span { display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.22em; color: var(--gold); margin-bottom: 12px; }
.section-label h2 { font-family: var(--display); font-size: clamp(2rem, 3.5vw, 3rem); font-weight: 800; color: var(--ink); line-height: 1.15; margin-bottom: 16px; }
.section-label p { font-size: 16px; color: var(--muted); max-width: 520px; margin: 0 auto; line-height: 1.7; }

/* PRODUCTS */
.products { padding: 100px 5vw; background: var(--cream); }
.products-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(280px, 1fr)); gap: 28px; max-width: 1260px; margin: 0 auto; }
.card { background: #fff; border-radius: 24px; overflow: hidden; border: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.07); box-shadow: 0 4px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.06); transition: transform .3s cubic-bezier(.22,1,.36,1), box-shadow .3s; display: flex; flex-direction: column; }
.card:hover { transform: translateY(-8px); box-shadow: 0 20px 60px rgba(0,0,0,0.12); }
.card-img { width: 100%; aspect-ratio: 1/1; overflow: hidden; background: var(--warm); }
.card-img img { width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; transition: transform .5s cubic-bezier(.22,1,.36,1); }
.card:hover .card-img img { transform: scale(1.07); }
.card-body { padding: 24px; flex: 1; display: flex; flex-direction: column; }
.card-tag { font-size: 10.5px; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.15em; color: var(--gold); margin-bottom: 8px; }
.card h3 { font-family: var(--display); font-size: 21px; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 10px; color: var(--ink); }
.card p { font-size: 14px; color: var(--muted); line-height: 1.65; flex: 1; margin-bottom: 20px; }
.card-btn { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 9px; background: var(--wa); color: #fff; padding: 13px; border-radius: 12px; font-size: 14.5px; font-weight: 700; text-decoration: none; transition: background .2s, transform .15s; }
.card-btn:hover { background: var(--wa-dark); transform: scale(1.02); }

/* CTA */
.cta { background: var(--ink); padding: 100px 5vw; text-align: center; position: relative; overflow: hidden; }
.cta::before { content: ''; position: absolute; top: -40%; left: 50%; transform: translateX(-50%); width: 700px; height: 700px; border-radius: 50%; background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(200,151,58,0.1) 0%, transparent 70%); pointer-events: none; }
.cta .badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; border: 1px solid rgba(200,151,58,0.3); background: rgba(200,151,58,0.07); color: var(--gold); padding: 8px 18px; border-radius: 50px; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.15em; margin-bottom: 28px; }
.cta h2 { font-family: var(--display); font-size: clamp(2.2rem, 4.5vw, 3.8rem); font-weight: 900; color: #fff; line-height: 1.1; margin-bottom: 20px; }
.cta h2 em { font-style: normal; color: var(--gold); }
.cta p { font-size: 17px; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.6); max-width: 520px; margin: 0 auto 44px; line-height: 1.7; }
.cta-btn { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; background: var(--wa); color: #fff; padding: 18px 40px; border-radius: 50px; font-size: 16.5px; font-weight: 700; text-decoration: none; box-shadow: 0 12px 48px rgba(37,211,102,0.35); transition: all .2s; }
.cta-btn:hover { background: var(--wa-dark); transform: scale(1.04); }

/* FOOTER */
footer { background: #080c10; padding: 40px 5vw; display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 20px; border-top: 1px solid rgba(200,151,58,0.15); }
footer .logo-name { font-size: 15px; color: #fff; }
footer p { font-size: 13px; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.35); }
footer a.footer-link { font-size: 13px; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.5); text-decoration: none; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; transition: color .2s; }
footer a.footer-link:hover { color: var(--wa); }

/* WA FLOAT */
.wa-float { position: fixed; bottom: 28px; right: 28px; z-index: 999; width: 58px; height: 58px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--wa); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; box-shadow: 0 8px 32px rgba(37,211,102,0.45); transition: transform .2s, box-shadow .2s; text-decoration: none; }
.wa-float:hover { transform: scale(1.1); box-shadow: 0 12px 48px rgba(37,211,102,0.55); }
.wa-float svg { width: 28px; height: 28px; fill: #fff; }

/* RESPONSIVE */
@media (max-width: 768px) {
  nav { display: none; }
  .hero { grid-template-columns: 1fr; padding: 60px 5vw; min-height: auto; }
  .hero-visual { display: none; }
  .hero h1 { font-size: 2.6rem; }
  .products-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(240px, 1fr)); gap: 20px; }
  footer { flex-direction: column; align-items: flex-start; }
}

/* ANIMATIONS */
@keyframes fadeUp { from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(30px); } to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); } }
.hero-content > * { animation: fadeUp .7s both; }
.hero-badge { animation-delay: .05s; }
.hero h1 { animation-delay: .15s; }
.hero p { animation-delay: .25s; }
.hero-btns { animation-delay: .35s; }
.hero-visual { animation: fadeUp .8s .3s both; }
</style>
</head>
<body>

<a href="https://wa.me/message/3ENXHJ55NHHPJ1" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="wa-float" aria-label="Chat on WhatsApp">
  <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="white"><path d="M17.472 14.382c-.297-.149-1.758-.867-2.03-.967-.273-.099-.471-.148-.67.15-.197.297-.767.966-.94 1.164-.173.199-.347.223-.644.075-.297-.15-1.255-.463-2.39-1.475-.883-.788-1.48-1.761-1.653-2.059-.173-.297-.018-.458.13-.606.134-.133.298-.347.446-.52.149-.174.198-.298.298-.497.099-.198.05-.371-.025-.52-.075-.149-.669-1.612-.916-2.207-.242-.579-.487-.5-.669-.51l-.57-.01c-.198 0-.52.074-.792.372s-1.04 1.016-1.04 2.479 1.065 2.876 1.213 3.074c.149.198 2.096 3.2 5.077 4.487.71.306 1.263.489 1.694.626.712.226 1.36.194 1.872.118.571-.085 1.758-.719 2.006-1.413.248-.694.248-1.289.173-1.413-.074-.124-.272-.198-.57-.347zM12.04 21.785h-.004a9.87 9.87 0 01-5.031-1.378l-.36-.214-3.741.982.999-3.648-.235-.374a9.86 9.86 0 01-1.51-5.26c.001-5.45 4.436-9.884 9.888-9.884 2.64 0 5.122 1.03 6.988 2.898a9.825 9.825 0 012.893 6.994c-.003 5.45-4.437 9.884-9.885 9.884zm8.413-18.297A11.815 11.815 0 0012.04 0C5.463 0 .104 5.335.101 11.892c-.001 2.096.547 4.142 1.588 5.945L0 24l6.305-1.654a11.882 11.882 0 005.683 1.448h.005c6.554 0 11.892-5.335 11.896-11.893a11.821 11.821 0 00-3.435-8.413z"/></svg>
</a>

<header class="header">
  <a href="#" class="logo">
    <div class="logo-icon">🖊️</div>
    <div>
      <div class="logo-name">Sandhya Rubber Stamp</div>
      <div class="logo-sub">Custom Stamps · Surat</div>
    </div>
  </a>
  <nav>
    <a href="#products">Products</a>
    <a href="#why">Why Us</a>
    <a href="#contact">Contact</a>
  </nav>
  <a href="https://wa.me/message/3ENXHJ55NHHPJ1" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="hdr-cta">
    <svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor"><path d="M17.472 14.382c-.297-.149-1.758-.867-2.03-.967-.273-.099-.471-.148-.67.15-.197.297-.767.966-.94 1.164-.173.199-.347.223-.644.075-.297-.15-1.255-.463-2.39-1.475-.883-.788-1.48-1.761-1.653-2.059-.173-.297-.018-.458.13-.606.134-.133.298-.347.446-.52.149-.174.198-.298.298-.497.099-.198.05-.371-.025-.52-.075-.149-.669-1.612-.916-2.207-.242-.579-.487-.5-.669-.51l-.57-.01c-.198 0-.52.074-.792.372s-1.04 1.016-1.04 2.479 1.065 2.876 1.213 3.074c.149.198 2.096 3.2 5.077 4.487.71.306 1.263.489 1.694.626.712.226 1.36.194 1.872.118.571-.085 1.758-.719 2.006-1.413.248-.694.248-1.289.173-1.413-.074-.124-.272-.198-.57-.347zM12.04 21.785h-.004a9.87 9.87 0 01-5.031-1.378l-.36-.214-3.741.982.999-3.648-.235-.374a9.86 9.86 0 01-1.51-5.26c.001-5.45 4.436-9.884 9.888-9.884 2.64 0 5.122 1.03 6.988 2.898a9.825 9.825 0 012.893 6.994c-.003 5.45-4.437 9.884-9.885 9.884zm8.413-18.297A11.815 11.815 0 0012.04 0C5.463 0 .104 5.335.101 11.892c-.001 2.096.547 4.142 1.588 5.945L0 24l6.305-1.654a11.882 11.882 0 005.683 1.448h.005c6.554 0 11.892-5.335 11.896-11.893a11.821 11.821 0 00-3.435-8.413z"/></svg> Order Now
  </a>
</header>

<section class="hero">
  <div class="hero-content">
    <div class="hero-badge">✦ Premium Quality · Fast Turnaround</div>
    <h1>Custom Stamps<br/>for <em>Every Need.</em></h1>
    <p>Crisp, durable, professionally crafted rubber stamps — designed and delivered to match the way you work. From offices to creative studios.</p>
    <div class="hero-btns">
      <a href="https://wa.me/message/3ENXHJ55NHHPJ1" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="btn-wa">
        <svg width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor"><path d="M17.472 14.382c-.297-.149-1.758-.867-2.03-.967-.273-.099-.471-.148-.67.15-.197.297-.767.966-.94 1.164-.173.199-.347.223-.644.075-.297-.15-1.255-.463-2.39-1.475-.883-.788-1.48-1.761-1.653-2.059-.173-.297-.018-.458.13-.606.134-.133.298-.347.446-.52.149-.174.198-.298.298-.497.099-.198.05-.371-.025-.52-.075-.149-.669-1.612-.916-2.207-.242-.579-.487-.5-.669-.51l-.57-.01c-.198 0-.52.074-.792.372s-1.04 1.016-1.04 2.479 1.065 2.876 1.213 3.074c.149.198 2.096 3.2 5.077 4.487.71.306 1.263.489 1.694.626.712.226 1.36.194 1.872.118.571-.085 1.758-.719 2.006-1.413.248-.694.248-1.289.173-1.413-.074-.124-.272-.198-.57-.347zM12.04 21.785h-.004a9.87 9.87 0 01-5.031-1.378l-.36-.214-3.741.982.999-3.648-.235-.374a9.86 9.86 0 01-1.51-5.26c.001-5.45 4.436-9.884 9.888-9.884 2.64 0 5.122 1.03 6.988 2.898a9.825 9.825 0 012.893 6.994c-.003 5.45-4.437 9.884-9.885 9.884zm8.413-18.297A11.815 11.815 0 0012.04 0C5.463 0 .104 5.335.101 11.892c-.001 2.096.547 4.142 1.588 5.945L0 24l6.305-1.654a11.882 11.882 0 005.683 1.448h.005c6.554 0 11.892-5.335 11.896-11.893a11.821 11.821 0 00-3.435-8.413z"/></svg> Order via WhatsApp
      </a>
      <a href="#products" class="btn-outline">Browse Stamps ↓</a>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="hero-visual">
    <div class="hero-img-main"><img src="data:image/webp;base64," alt="Self Ink Stamp" loading="eager"/></div>
    <div class="hero-img-sub"><img src="data:image/webp;base64," alt="Round Pre-Ink Stamp" loading="eager"/></div>
    <div class="hero-img-sub"><img src="data:image/webp;base64," alt="Wax Seal Stamp" loading="eager"/></div>
  </div>
</section>

<section id="why" class="why">
  <div class="section-label">
    <span>Why Choose Us</span>
    <h2>Crafted with precision.<br/>Delivered with speed.</h2>
  </div>
  <div class="why-grid">
    <div class="why-card"><div class="why-icon">⚡</div><h3>Fast Delivery</h3><p>Most orders crafted and dispatched within 24–48 hours. We move at the speed of your business.</p></div>
    <div class="why-card"><div class="why-icon">🎯</div><h3>Sharp Impressions</h3><p>Precision-engraved dies for clean, consistent prints every single time — from the first press to the thousandth.</p></div>
    <div class="why-card"><div class="why-icon">✏️</div><h3>Fully Customizable</h3><p>Logos, signatures, addresses — every stamp is built exactly to your specification. Nothing off the shelf.</p></div>
    <div class="why-card"><div class="why-icon">💬</div><h3>WhatsApp Ordering</h3><p>Just send us a message. Simple, fast, and personal — no complicated forms or lengthy emails.</p></div>
  </div>
</section>

<section id="products" class="products">
  <div class="section-label">
    <span>Our Catalogue</span>
    <h2>Ten stamps.<br/>Endless applications.</h2>
    <p>Tap any product to order directly through WhatsApp. We'll handle the rest.</p>
  </div>
  <div class="products-grid">
    
    <article class="card">
      <div class="card-img"><img src="data:image/webp;base64," alt="One Line Stamp" loading="lazy"/></div>
      <div class="card-body">
        <div class="card-tag">Pre-Inked</div>
        <h3>One Line Stamp</h3>
        <p>Clean, compact, and ready to go. Perfect for single-line text impressions like signatures, 'Received', or short business info.</p>
        <a href="https://wa.me/message/3ENXHJ55NHHPJ1" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="card-btn"><svg width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor"><path d="M17.472 14.382c-.297-.149-1.758-.867-2.03-.967-.273-.099-.471-.148-.67.15-.197.297-.767.966-.94 1.164-.173.199-.347.223-.644.075-.297-.15-1.255-.463-2.39-1.475-.883-.788-1.48-1.761-1.653-2.059-.173-.297-.018-.458.13-.606.134-.133.298-.347.446-.52.149-.174.198-.298.298-.497.099-.198.05-.371-.025-.52-.075-.149-.669-1.612-.916-2.207-.242-.579-.487-.5-.669-.51l-.57-.01c-.198 0-.52.074-.792.372s-1.04 1.016-1.04 2.479 1.065 2.876 1.213 3.074c.149.198 2.096 3.2 5.077 4.487.71.306 1.263.489 1.694.626.712.226 1.36.194 1.872.118.571-.085 1.758-.719 2.006-1.413.248-.694.248-1.289.173-1.413-.074-.124-.272-.198-.57-.347zM12.04 21.785h-.004a9.87 9.87 0 01-5.031-1.378l-.36-.214-3.741.982.999-3.648-.235-.374a9.86 9.86 0 01-1.51-5.26c.001-5.45 4.436-9.884 9.888-9.884 2.64 0 5.122 1.03 6.988 2.898a9.825 9.825 0 012.893 6.994c-.003 5.45-4.437 9.884-9.885 9.884zm8.413-18.297A11.815 11.815 0 0012.04 0C5.463 0 .104 5.335.101 11.892c-.001 2.096.547 4.142 1.588 5.945L0 24l6.305-1.654a11.882 11.882 0 005.683 1.448h.005c6.554 0 11.892-5.335 11.896-11.893a11.821 11.821 0 00-3.435-8.413z"/></svg>Order via WhatsApp</a>
      </div>
    </article>
    <article class="card">
      <div class="card-img"><img src="data:image/webp;base64," alt="Branding Pre-Ink Stamp" loading="lazy"/></div>
      <div class="card-body">
        <div class="card-tag">Pre-Inked</div>
